trickyParts: The rebase_pr action appeared in two separate branches of decision.ts (hasWorkerDone path and no-worker-done path) — both needed updating
The retro-skip code block in SKILL.md had an if/elif/else structure where the CONFLICTING branch called update-branch with a fallback — replaced with direct resume_implementer dispatch
The ACTION_TO_MODE entry for rebase_pr was removed entirely since the action no longer exists
